testcase.name: test_cluster_dropdown_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Should have at least 2 view options assert 0 >= 2 + where 0 = len([])

testcase.failure: tests/test_genealogy_visualization.py:81: in test_cluster_dropdown_exists assert len(options) >= 2, "Should have at least 2 view options" E AssertionError: Should have at least 2 view options E assert 0 >= 2 E + where 0 = len([])

testcase.name: test_mobile_homepage_loads

skipped.message: iOS Simulator not available. Ensure Appium server is running and a simulator/device is booted. Details: Message: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Unable to start WebDriverAgent session. Original error: Could not proxy command to the remote server. Original error: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:8100 Stacktrace: UnknownError: An unknown server-side error occurred while processing the command. Original error: Unable to start WebDriverAgent session. Original error: Could not proxy command to the remote server.
